This is the weekly visible open thread. Post about anything you want, ask random questions, whatever. ACX has an unofficial subreddit [ https://substack.com/redirect/c47de80b-d694-4849-938d-a60f381b9c1b?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], Discord [ https://substack.com/redirect/7f59f022-d9a4-48fc-8088-ad3ae0957816?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], and bulletin board [ https://substack.com/redirect/38516183-8d33-4e11-a13b-5e3fe1b4d89c?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ], and in-person meetups around the world [ https://substack.com/redirect/1bed68c2-9970-4811-a742-dbfdbeb1214e?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ]. 95% of content is free, but for the remaining 5% you can subscribe here [ https://substack.com/redirect/25dd82be-9709-429b-8b54-9104000383b5?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ].
